title: Mediated mode with demonstrated mediation enforces (macOS sandbox-exec)
description: Item 9: mediated mode is a SECOND real-enforcing mode. SIR launches the process under the sir-macos-sandbox provider's deny-network Seatbelt profile (sandbox-exec) — a real, Docker-independent containment mechanism. With a pre-exec mediated signal AND demonstrated mediation (provider_enforcement=real, backed by capture.json from a real sandboxed egress that the kernel blocked), enforceability=enforces. Compare mediated-declared-only-detects: the SAME pre-exec signal WITHOUT proof scores only detects. This closes the false-enforces gap for mediated, parallel to the contained gate.
